title: arachnorchis pholcoidea subsp. augustensis
intro: Arachnorchis pholcoidea subsp. augustensis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Arachnorchis pholcoidea subsp. augustensis include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
